steps.prompt: Which word is the main verb?

hints.boni: 'boni' is an adjective used as a noun meaning 'the good (citizens)'
hints.salutem: 'salutem' is a noun in the accusative meaning 'safety / welfare'

hints.Present indicative: Present would be 'defendunt' — 'defendent' with -ent ending is future
hints.Present subjunctive: Present subjunctive would be 'defendant' — 'defendent' is future indicative

hints.offendo, offendere, offendi, offensum: These are the parts of 'offendere' (to offend/strike against)
hints.fendo, fendere, —, —: 'fendere' only exists in compounds like 'defendere' — it is not a standalone verb
hints.contendo, contendere, contendi, contentu: These are the parts of 'contendere' (to strive/contend)

hints.Nominative: Nominative would be 'salus' — 'salutem' with -em ending is accusative, object of 'defendent'
Nominative would be 'res publica' — 'rei publicae' is genitive, modifying 'salutem'
hints.Dative: Dative is also 'rei publicae', but here it modifies 'salutem' as genitive (the safety of the republic)
hints.Ablative: Ablative would be 're publica' — 'rei publicae' is genitive here

steps.prompt: What does 'omnes boni' mean in Ciceronian political vocabulary?
steps.target: All loyal citizens / the conservative establishment (optimates)
choices: All loyal citizens / the conservative establishment (optimates)

hints.All morally perfect people: 'boni' in Cicero's political usage means 'loyal, patriotic citizens' — a political, not purely moral, category
hints.All wealthy Romans: 'boni' is not about wealth but about political loyalty to the republican order
hints.All senators: 'boni' includes senators but also loyal equestrians and citizens — it's broader than just the senate

steps.prompt: What is the rhetorical function of this promise?
steps.target: To reassure the audience that the loyal majority will prevail
choices: To threaten the conspirators with violence
To reassure the audience that the loyal majority will prevail

hints.To threaten the conspirators with violen: While implicit, the primary function is reassurance of the loyal citizens
hints.To announce an election: There is no election — this is a promise about defending the state
hints.To declare martial law: Cicero is not declaring martial law — he is rallying citizen support

translation: For all good citizens will defend the welfare of the republic.
